items.name: A fantasy illustrative picture of an adult elf woman and a goliath knight walking through a dark swa
items.prompt: A fantasy illustrative picture of an adult elf woman and a goliath knight walking through a dark swamp. She is a Druid. She has long pierced ears. She wears small gold chains around her neck. She has medium dark green-blue hair and straight bangs. She has black facial tattoos. She has golden colored, sharp eyes. She wears black leather armor. A muscular giant knight in old chainmail armor stands beside her. His mouth and chin are visible. Half helmet . He is extremely tall.
